analysis_result: G5 has highest score (marker-based approximation): mean z-score 0.501 (G5), 0.230 (G3), 0.186 (G4), -0.409 (G2), -1.313 (G1).
discrepancy_analysis: Qualitative direction agrees — G5 (Sporadic Spinal NF_G5) is the highest methylation subgroup for non-syndromic spinal NF CIBERSORTx score in both the reported result and the model's marker-based approximation. CONCORDANT.
